title: Driver Teams — Job Assignment
tech: Node.js, TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma, JWT, Zod, React 18, Vite
keyConstraints: TypeScript strict, server-side validation with Zod, no trust of frontend input, Prisma for all DB queries, CSS Modules only (no inline styles)
description: When a driver is added to a team, their ASSIGNED/IN_PROGRESS jobs auto-reassign to the team. Drivers in an active team are excluded from the individual driver assignment pool. Dispatcher can assign jobs to a team. Team dissolution is blocked if active team jobs exist.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/teams/:id/members — adding a driver auto-reassigns their ASSIGNED/IN_PROGRESS jobs to the team in a single DB transaction (assignedDriverId → null, teamId → team id)
DELETE /api/teams/:id — returns 409 if any team jobs have status ASSIGNED or IN_PROGRESS; on success bulk-sets team jobs to DRAFT and clears teamId in same transaction as team deletion
Driver assignment pool (dispatcher UI) excludes drivers who have a TeamMember record (where: { role: DRIVER, teamMemberships: { none: {} } })
Dispatcher/Admin can assign a job to a team via the job edit modal — team picker available alongside driver picker
npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors
implementationNotes: POST /api/teams/:id/members body: { userId: string } — prisma.$transaction: create TeamMember + updateMany jobs where assignedDriverId = userId AND status IN ['ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS'] SET assignedDriverId = null, teamId = team id

DELETE /api/teams/:id: count jobs where teamId = id AND status IN ['ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS'], return 409 if count > 0; else prisma.$transaction: updateMany jobs SET status = DRAFT + teamId = null, delete TeamMembers, delete Team
Driver pool for dispatcher: where: { role: 'DRIVER', teamMemberships: { none: {} } }
Job edit modal: fetch GET /api/teams for team dropdown; PATCH /api/jobs/:id with teamId set and assignedDriverId: null when assigning to team
